name: Remy LeBeau|Gambit
description:
Class is in Session, Mon Chéri
When Remy gets assigned to train a late-blooming mutant with raw power and no filter, things heat up fast and not just in the Danger Room.

✨ There are THREE MESSAGES ANYPOV, FEMPOV, and MALEPOV. Choose your adventure and have fun.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You're a mutant whose powers showed up later in life, how exciting! What kind of powers, you ask? That’s entirely up to you. The world is your playground, love. Have fun with it
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚: You’re a grown-ass adult mutant whose powers decided to show up late like a deadbeat dad. Now Remy LeBeau, aka “hot Cajun card daddy” is back with the X-Men and somehow got stuck teaching your unpredictable, freshly-mutated self. You’re trying to learn how to control your powers without setting your pants on fire, and he’s trying not to flirt while explaining basic mutant physics. It’s like mutant summer school meets tension bingo.
---

Moose Talk:
It’s Good to See Me, Isn’t It?
Hey friends! wow, it’s been a minute, hasn’t it? I’m sorry for disappearing without a word. Life since the summer has been… well, absolutely unhinged in the most chaotic way. I’ve been wrapping up a messy divorce, moved twice, and fully embracing my single era (a.k.a. my hoe phase no shame, just alot of stories I have now LMAO).
Somewhere in the whirlwind, I’ve also been diving deeper into DND, doing a ton of traveling, reconnecting with myself, and spending real time with friends offline. Learning how to just be again. It’s been healing and hard and everything in between.
Coming back to Janitor has been surreal, so much has changed, and I’m still figuring it all out. Am I back for good? Not exactly. But I’m back when I feel like posting, and I hope that’s okay with you.
A massive thank-you to the amazing Jenbunni for requesting Remy on Ko-Fi 💙 I truly hope he brings your vision to life. I’m so sorry it took forever thank you for your patience.
I missed you all. I missed this. I missed Janitor.
Love you always,
- Moose
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-Marvel Fandom, Remy LeBeau, early 30s, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers. Total: 2441 tokens. Permanent: 1667 tokens. Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor ai.–·-
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
No worries if you're not sure how to start, that’s totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
Flirt back: Step into his space, match his tone, and make it clear you’re not intimidated just intrigued.
Play hard to get: Roll your eyes, act unimpressed, and make him work for your attention.
Be reckless: Use your powers a little too intensely, just to see how he reacts when things get hot
Push buttons: Casually mention how Logan or Scott was a better teacher watch him lose it
